title: The Splendid Table: Conversations & Recipes For Curious Cooks & Eaters
author: American Public Media
description: Subscribe to our weekly newsletter, The Weeknight Kitchen, to receive practical, delicious weeknight-ready recipes. Once a month, we also share a sweet treat or baking recipe. Sign up at Splendidtable.org/newsletter Produced by American Public Media. Part of the Vox Media Podcast Network]]>
